mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in unemployment rate signals tightening labor markets, increasing corporate earnings momentum and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of UNRATE decline are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in industrial production and decline in manufacturing inventories signals strong supply-side dynamics, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of INDPRO/RSAFS co-movement are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in housing starts above 1.3 million units signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in periods of HOUST > 1300.0 are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 12-month CPI inflation rate above 3% triggers central bank tightening expectations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of CPIAUCSL > 3.0 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in nonfarm payrolls below 100k signals weak labor market conditions, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of PAYEMS < 100.0 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in GDP growth and rise in consumer confidence signals economic weakness, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns in periods of GDPC1/CPIAUCSL co-movement are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production below 100 signals weakening supply-side activity, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns in periods of INDPRO < 100.0 are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.
